title: cymbidium × baoshanense
intro: Cymbidium × baoshanense, also known as Baoshan orchid, is a hybrid orchid species obtained by crossing the Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium faberi plants. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Cymbidium × baoshanense include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
